image:image.image:title: Calgary Watch — Real-Time Community Safety Map for Calgary and Surrounding Communities
image:image.image:caption: Interactive real-time crime and safety incident map covering Calgary, Airdrie, Cochrane, Okotoks, Chestermere, Strathmore, High River, and 30+ Alberta communities

image:image.image:title: Live Calgary Crime and Incident Map | Calgary Watch
image:image.image:caption: Real-time interactive map showing community-reported safety incidents across the Calgary metro area

image:image.image:caption: Calgary Watch team and mission: community-powered real-time safety data for Calgary and area

image:image.image:title: Calgary Area Safety Guide — 30+ Communities Covered | Calgary Watch
image:image.image:caption: Community coverage directory for Calgary Watch — Airdrie, Cochrane, Okotoks, Chestermere, Strathmore, High River, Canmore, and all surrounding Alberta communities
